1.en: In this video, we're going to take a look at combining together tool use with streaming.
1.zh_tw: 在這個影片中，我們要看看工具使用結合串流的情況。
1.zh_cn: 在这个视频中，我们要看看工具使用结合流式的情況。

2.en: You'll recall that we discussed streaming from the API earlier.
2.zh_tw: 你應該記得我們之前討論過從 API 進行串流。
2.zh_cn: 你应该记得我们之前討论过从 API 进行流式。

3.en: Streaming allows us to give users a better idea of what's going on in our app.
3.zh_tw: 串流讓我們能給使用者更好地了解應用程式中正在發生什麼。
3.zh_cn: 流式让我们能给使用者更好地了解应用程序中正在发生什麼。

4.en: So whenever we have streaming enabled and we make a request off to Claude,
4.zh_tw: 當啟用串流並向 Claude 發請求時，
4.zh_cn: 当啟用流式並向 Claude 发请求时，

5.en: we're going to get back some initial response,
5.zh_tw: 會先得到一些初始回應，
5.zh_cn: 会先得到一些初始回应，

6.en: and then we'll receive a series of different events,
6.zh_tw: 然後收到一系列不同的事件，
6.zh_cn: 然后收到一系列不同的事件，

7.en: and each event will have some additional piece of text
7.zh_tw: 每個事件會有一些額外的文字片段
7.zh_cn: 每个事件会有一些额外的文字片段

8.en: that we might want to display to the user.
8.zh_tw: 我們可能想顯示給使用者。
8.zh_cn: 我们可能想显示给使用者。

9.en: You might recall that there are many different types of events
9.zh_tw: 你可能記得在應用程式中
9.zh_cn: 你可能记得在应用程序中

10.en: that we might need to handle inside of our application,
10.zh_tw: 需要處理很多不同類型的事件，
10.zh_cn: 需要处理很多不同类型的事件，

11.en: and a very common one that we need to be on the lookout for is content block delta.
11.zh_tw: 非常常見的一個是 content block delta。
11.zh_cn: 非常常見的一个是 content block delta。

12.en: To make use of tools with streaming,

13.en: we're going to add in an additional type of event that we need to handle,
13.zh_tw: 需要加入一個額外的事件類型來處理，
13.zh_cn: 需要加入一个额外的事件类型來处理，

14.en: and it's called the input JSON event.

15.en: So now if we turn on streaming and try to make use of tools,
15.zh_tw: 現在如果開啟串流並嘗試使用工具，
15.zh_cn: 现在如果开啟流式並嘗试使用工具，

16.en: Claude might send back a new type of event to us called the input JSON event.
16.zh_tw: Claude 可能會送回一個叫 input JSON event 的新事件類型。
16.zh_cn: Claude 可能会送回一个叫 input JSON event 的新事件类型。

17.en: This object is going to have two important properties on it.
17.zh_tw: 這個物件有兩個重要的屬性。
17.zh_cn: 这个对象有兩个重要的属性。

18.en: First, there's going to be a partial JSON,

19.en: which is going to be a piece of JSON that represents a part of an argument
19.zh_tw: 是一段 JSON 片段，代表 Claude 想送入工具的
19.zh_cn: 是一段 JSON 片段，代表 Claude 想送入工具的

20.en: that Claude wants to send into our tool.

21.en: We're also going to get something called the snapshot,
21.zh_tw: 還會得到叫做 snapshot 的東西，
21.zh_cn: 还会得到叫做 snapshot 的東西，

22.en: which is a cumulative sum of all the different partial JSON pieces that we have received so far.
22.zh_tw: 是目前收到的所有不同 partial JSON 片段的累積總和。
22.zh_cn: 是目前收到的所有不同 partial JSON 片段的累积总和。

23.en: To give you a better idea of how this works,
23.zh_tw: 為了更好地了解這如何運作，
23.zh_cn: 为了更好地了解这如何运作，

24.en: I put together a new notebook called 003 tool streaming.
24.zh_tw: 我建了一個叫 003 tool streaming 的新筆記本。
24.zh_cn: 我建了一个叫 003 tool streaming 的新笔记本。

26.en: This notebook contains a modified run conversation function.
26.zh_tw: 筆記本包含修改過的 run conversation 函式。
26.zh_cn: 笔记本包含修改过的 run conversation 函数。

27.en: It's going to use a new function called chat stream to open up a response stream from the Anthropoc API.
27.zh_tw: 用新的 chat stream 函式從 Anthropic API 開啟回應串流。
27.zh_cn: 用新的 chat stream 函数从 Anthropic API 开啟回应流式。

28.en: Then for every chunk in that stream,

29.en: we're going to process each one depending upon the type of chunk it is.
29.zh_tw: 根據 chunk 類型來處理每一個。
29.zh_cn: 根据 chunk 类型來处理每一个。

30.en: In the case of receiving an input JSON chunk,
30.zh_tw: 收到 input JSON chunk 時，
30.zh_cn: 收到 input JSON chunk 时，

31.en: all we're going to do right now is print it out.

32.en: So I'm going to go down to the bottom where I've already put together a prompt
32.zh_tw: 往下到底部，已經準備好了一個提示
32.zh_cn: 往下到底部，已经准备好了一个提示

33.en: along with a new tool called save article schema.
33.zh_tw: 和一個叫 save article schema 的新工具。
33.zh_cn: 和一个叫 save article schema 的新工具。

34.en: I'm going to run this notebook and let's just see what happens.
34.zh_tw: 執行筆記本看看會發生什麼。
34.zh_cn: 执行笔记本看看会发生什麼。

35.en: Pretty quickly, we'll see each chunk of the response come in,
35.zh_tw: 很快就會看到回應的每個 chunk 進來，
35.zh_cn: 很快就会看到回应的每个 chunk 进來，

36.en: including the arguments for the tool call.

37.en: You'll notice that this notebook is also generating a scholarly article
37.zh_tw: 你會注意到這個筆記本也在生成學術文章，
37.zh_cn: 你会注意到这个笔记本也在生成学术文章，

38.en: just with a few different properties compared to what we had previously.
38.zh_tw: 只是和之前相比有幾個不同的屬性。
38.zh_cn: 只是和之前相比有幾个不同的属性。

39.en: Now, to be honest, there isn't really a lot more to tool streaming beyond this.
39.zh_tw: 老實說，工具串流除此之外沒有太多東西。
39.zh_cn: 老实说，工具流式除此之外没有太多東西。

40.en: We really just need to make sure that we handle that additional type of event.
40.zh_tw: 真的只需要確保處理那個額外的事件類型。
40.zh_cn: 真的只需要确保处理那个额外的事件类型。

41.en: Having said that, there is one other aspect of tool streaming that I would like to tell you about,
41.zh_tw: 話雖如此，工具串流還有另一個方面我想告訴你，
41.zh_cn: 话雖如此，工具流式还有另一个方面我想告訴你，

42.en: but it's around a very, very particular feature that you might not ever need to make use of.
42.zh_tw: 但是關於一個非常非常特殊的功能，你可能永遠不需要使用。
42.zh_cn: 但是关於一个非常非常特殊的功能，你可能永远不需要使用。

43.en: So let me give you a very quick overview,
43.zh_tw: 讓我給你一個很快的概覽，
43.zh_cn: 让我给你一个很快的概览，

44.en: and then you can decide if you want to hear about this very specialized feature or not.
44.zh_tw: 然後你可以決定是否想了解這個非常專業的功能。
44.zh_cn: 然后你可以决定是否想了解这个非常專業的功能。

45.en: If I rerun this notebook, you might notice that it appears that we are getting streaming behavior.
45.zh_tw: 如果重新執行筆記本，你可能注意到看似有串流行為。
45.zh_cn: 如果重新执行笔记本，你可能注意到看似有流式行为。

46.en: Text is appearing chunk by chunk.

47.en: But for our tool call arguments in particular,
47.zh_tw: 但對於工具呼叫的參數，
47.zh_cn: 但对於工具调用的参数，

48.en: you'll notice that we have to sit around and wait for a few seconds,
48.zh_tw: 你會注意到必須等待幾秒，
48.zh_cn: 你会注意到必须等待幾秒，

49.en: and then all of a sudden, a giant chunk of text appears.
49.zh_tw: 然後突然一大塊文字出現。
49.zh_cn: 然后突然一大块文字出现。

50.en: The fact that there's this really big delay, and then we get a giant chunk of text,
50.zh_tw: 這個很大的延遲然後一大塊文字出現的事實，
50.zh_cn: 这个很大的延迟然后一大块文字出现的事实，

51.en: might not be a big deal to you at all.
51.zh_tw: 可能對你來說完全不是問題。
51.zh_cn: 可能对你來说完全不是问题。

52.en: However, you might be working on an application where it's really important
52.zh_tw: 然而，你可能在開發一個應用程式，
52.zh_cn: 然而，你可能在开发一个应用程序，

53.en: to show very precise content updates to your users as soon as possible.
53.zh_tw: 需要盡快向使用者顯示非常精確的內容更新。
53.zh_cn: 需要尽快向使用者显示非常精确的內容更新。

54.en: Or perhaps you want to receive portions of a tool call as quickly as possible,
54.zh_tw: 或者你可能想盡快收到工具呼叫的部分，
54.zh_cn: 或者你可能想尽快收到工具调用的部分，

55.en: so you can start doing some processing work as fast as you possibly can.
55.zh_tw: 以便盡快開始做一些處理工作。
55.zh_cn: 以便尽快开始做一些处理工作。

56.en: So in the remainder of this video,
56.zh_tw: 在這個影片的剩餘部分，
56.zh_cn: 在这个视频的剩余部分，

57.en: I'm going to help you understand why there is that big delay,
57.zh_tw: 我要幫你理解為什麼會有那個大延遲，
57.zh_cn: 我要幫你理解为什麼会有那个大延迟，

58.en: and then a giant chunk of text appears.

59.en: And I'm going to show you a feature in the Anthropic API to get rid of that delay.
59.zh_tw: 我也要展示 Anthropic API 中消除這個延遲的功能。
59.zh_cn: 我也要展示 Anthropic API 中消除这个延迟的功能。

61.en: The first thing I would like to do is clarify the tool that I have added into this notebook.
61.zh_tw: 首先我想說明一下我加到筆記本中的工具。
61.zh_cn: 首先我想说明一下我加到笔记本中的工具。

62.en: So I've slightly adjusted the tool that we had previously that was generating a scholarly article.
62.zh_tw: 稍微調整了之前生成學術文章的工具。
62.zh_cn: 稍微调整了之前生成学术文章的工具。

63.en: We're still generating an article, but now it has a slightly different input structure to it.
63.zh_tw: 仍然在生成文章，但現在有稍微不同的輸入結構。
63.zh_cn: 仍然在生成文章，但现在有稍微不同的输入结构。

64.en: I've got an example of the expected input on the bottom left-hand side.
64.zh_tw: 左下角有一個預期輸入的範例。
64.zh_cn: 左下角有一个预期输入的范例。

65.en: So we expect to receive a key of abstract, that's kind of like a summary of a scholarly paper,
65.zh_tw: 期望收到 abstract 鍵，類似學術論文的摘要，
65.zh_cn: 期望收到 abstract 键，类似学术论文的摘要，

67.en: And the meta object is going to have a word count and a review.
67.zh_tw: meta 物件會有 word count 和 review。
67.zh_cn: meta 对象会有 word count 和 review。

68.en: And the review, in theory, is going to be some long review of the particular paper that's been generated.
68.zh_tw: review 理論上是對生成論文的一段長評論。
68.zh_cn: review 理论上是对生成论文的一段长评论。

69.en: Now, out of this example input right here,

70.en: there's something that I really just want to examine really quickly or just kind of point out.

71.en: In this big object that we get, we're going to have two top-level keys.
71.zh_tw: 在這個大物件中，會有兩個頂層鍵。
71.zh_cn: 在这个大对象中，会有兩个頂层键。

72.en: In other words, the top-level keys inside the entire big object.
72.zh_tw: 換句話說，整個大物件中的頂層鍵。
72.zh_cn: 换句话说，整个大对象中的頂层键。

74.en: So we would refer to those as top-level keys.

75.en: Meta is going to point to an object that has some additional key value pairs inside of it.
75.zh_tw: meta 會指向一個內含額外鍵值對的物件。
75.zh_cn: meta 会指向一个內含额外键值对的对象。

76.en: But again, the top-level keys are abstract and meta.
76.zh_tw: 但再說一次，頂層鍵是 abstract 和 meta。
76.zh_cn: 但再说一次，頂层键是 abstract 和 meta。

77.en: So just keep that in your head for a little bit.

78.en: So now I want to help you understand what goes on behind the scenes inside the Anthropoc API
78.zh_tw: 現在我想幫你理解 Anthropic API 幕後發生的事情，
78.zh_cn: 现在我想幫你理解 Anthropic API 幕后发生的事情，

79.en: whenever we generate some arguments for a tool call in streaming mode.
79.zh_tw: 每當在串流模式中為工具呼叫生成參數時。
79.zh_cn: 每当在流式模式中为工具调用生成参数时。

80.en: So it doesn't quite behave as you might expect.
80.zh_tw: 行為和你預期的不太一樣。
80.zh_cn: 行为和你预期的不太一样。

81.en: In this diagram, on the top left-hand side, I've got our call being sent off to the Anthropoc API.
81.zh_tw: 在圖的左上方，是我們送給 Anthropic API 的呼叫。
81.zh_cn: 在圖的左上方，是我们送给 Anthropic API 的调用。

82.en: Once it receives our request, Cloud will start to generate some JSON,
82.zh_tw: 收到請求後，Claude 會開始生成一些 JSON，
82.zh_cn: 收到请求后，Claude 会开始生成一些 JSON，

83.en: which will be the input to our tool call.

84.en: The JSON isn't generated all at once.
84.zh_tw: JSON 不是一次全部生成的。
84.zh_cn: JSON 不是一次全部生成的。

85.en: Instead, it is created chunk by chunk.

86.en: Now, something kind of surprising happens at this point.
86.zh_tw: 這時候發生了一些令人驚訝的事。
86.zh_cn: 这时候发生了一些令人驚訝的事。

87.en: The Anthropoc API doesn't immediately take these chunks
87.zh_tw: Anthropic API 不會立即把這些 chunk
87.zh_cn: Anthropic API 不会立即把这些 chunk

88.en: and send them right back to our server immediately.
88.zh_tw: 馬上送回我們的伺服器。
88.zh_cn: 马上送回我们的服务器。

89.en: Instead, it's going to hang onto them for a little bit of time.

90.en: The reason for hanging onto these chunks is that Cloud can sometimes generate invalid JSON.
90.zh_tw: 保留的原因是 Claude 有時候會生成無效的 JSON。
90.zh_cn: 保留的原因是 Claude 有时候会生成无效的 JSON。

91.en: So rather than immediately sending each chunk to us,
91.zh_tw: 所以 API 不會立即送出每個 chunk，
91.zh_cn: 所以 API 不会立即送出每个 chunk，

92.en: the API is going to attempt to do a validation step,

93.en: where it makes sure that it is sending us valid JSON.
93.zh_tw: 確保送給我們的是有效的 JSON。
93.zh_cn: 确保送给我们的是有效的 JSON。

94.en: Let me show you how the validation step works.
94.zh_tw: 讓我展示驗證步驟的運作方式。
94.zh_cn: 让我展示验证步驟的运作方式。

95.en: First, as a reminder, we have two top-level keys for our tool call, abstract and meta.
95.zh_tw: 提醒一下，工具呼叫有兩個頂層鍵，abstract 和 meta。
95.zh_cn: 提醒一下，工具调用有兩个頂层键，abstract 和 meta。

96.en: So the API isn't going to wait for the entire object to be generated to do the validation.
96.zh_tw: API 不會等整個物件生成完才做驗證。
96.zh_cn: API 不会等整个对象生成完才做验证。

97.en: Instead, it will wait for a single top-level key value pair to be generated.
97.zh_tw: 而是等待單一頂層鍵值對生成完。
97.zh_cn: 而是等待单一頂层键值对生成完。

98.en: So in the case of the abstract key,

99.en: the Anthropoc API will wait until it sees a closing quote for the abstract value string.
99.zh_tw: Anthropic API 會等到看到 abstract 值字串的結束引號。
99.zh_cn: Anthropic API 会等到看到 abstract 值字符串的结束引号。

100.en: As soon as it sees that closing quote on the very far right-hand side on chunk number four,
100.zh_tw: 一旦在最右邊的第四個 chunk 看到結束引號，
100.zh_cn: 一旦在最右边的第四个 chunk 看到结束引号，

101.en: then the API knows that it has at least one key value pair generated.
101.zh_tw: API 就知道至少生成了一個鍵值對。
101.zh_cn: API 就知道至少生成了一个键值对。

102.en: In this case, the abstract key value pair.
102.zh_tw: 這裡是 abstract 鍵值對。
102.zh_cn: 这里是 abstract 键值对。

103.en: The API will then attempt to validate just that key value pair in isolation.
103.zh_tw: API 接著會嘗試單獨驗證這個鍵值對。
103.zh_cn: API 接著会嘗试单独验证这个键值对。

104.en: It's going to compare it against the JSON schema that we provided
104.zh_tw: 會和我們提供的 JSON Schema 比對，
104.zh_cn: 会和我们提供的 JSON Schema 比对，

105.en: and make sure that valid JSON has been produced.
105.zh_tw: 確保生成了有效的 JSON。
105.zh_cn: 确保生成了有效的 JSON。

106.en: If it is valid, then each of the original chunks that were produced
106.zh_tw: 如果有效，原始生成的每個 chunk
106.zh_cn: 如果有效，原始生成的每个 chunk

107.en: will be sent back down to our server.
107.zh_tw: 會被送回我們的伺服器。
107.zh_cn: 会被送回我们的服务器。

108.en: Note that we do get each individual chunk,
108.zh_tw: 注意我們確實收到每個單獨的 chunk，
108.zh_cn: 注意我们确实收到每个单独的 chunk，

109.en: not the entire key value pair as one single chunk.
109.zh_tw: 不是整個鍵值對作為一個 chunk。
109.zh_cn: 不是整个键值对作为一个 chunk。

110.en: If you were to log out all the different chunks that we receive inside of our notebook,
110.zh_tw: 如果在筆記本中記錄收到的所有 chunk，
110.zh_cn: 如果在笔记本中记录收到的所有 chunk，

111.en: you will see that we do in fact receive a ton of different individual chunks.
111.zh_tw: 會看到確實收到了大量個別的 chunk。
111.zh_cn: 会看到确实收到了大量个別的 chunk。

112.en: They just all happen to arrive at our server at just about the same time
112.zh_tw: 它們只是幾乎同時到達伺服器，
112.zh_cn: 它们只是幾乎同时到达服务器，

113.en: because the chunks have been buffered on the API so that it can go through this validation step.
113.zh_tw: 因為 chunk 被 API 緩衝以進行驗證步驟。
113.zh_cn: 因为 chunk 被 API 缓冲以进行验证步驟。

114.en: Then this generation process is going to continue with the meta top-level key.
114.zh_tw: 然後生成過程會繼續處理 meta 頂層鍵。
114.zh_cn: 然后生成过程会继续处理 meta 頂层键。

115.en: So once again, the API will wait until the entire meta top-level key value pair is generated.
115.zh_tw: API 再次等待整個 meta 頂層鍵值對生成完。
115.zh_cn: API 再次等待整个 meta 頂层键值对生成完。

116.en: It's then going to validate it and then send us each of the individual chunks back down to our server.
116.zh_tw: 然後驗證它，再把每個 chunk 送回伺服器。
116.zh_cn: 然后验证它，再把每个 chunk 送回服务器。

117.en: So this is why even with streaming enabled, we end up getting these really big pauses
117.zh_tw: 這就是即使啟用串流也會有大暫停的原因，
117.zh_cn: 这就是即使啟用流式也会有大暫停的原因，

118.en: as the chunks are buffered on the API.
118.zh_tw: 因為 chunk 被 API 緩衝了。
118.zh_cn: 因为 chunk 被 API 缓冲了。

119.en: And then all of a sudden we see a big group of chunks appear
119.zh_tw: 然後突然看到一大組 chunk 出現，
119.zh_cn: 然后突然看到一大组 chunk 出现，

120.en: or big chunk of text appear all at once, all of a sudden.
120.zh_tw: 或一大塊文字突然全部出現。
120.zh_cn: 或一大块文字突然全部出现。

121.en: Now, again, this behavior might be okay for you.
121.zh_tw: 這個行為對你來說可能沒問題。
121.zh_cn: 这个行为对你來说可能没问题。

122.en: You might not mind this buffering and validation step,
122.zh_tw: 你可能不介意這個緩衝和驗證步驟，
122.zh_cn: 你可能不介意这个缓冲和验证步驟，

123.en: but if you are building a UI where you want to show users updates as soon as possible,
123.zh_tw: 但如果你在建構 UI 想盡快給使用者更新，
123.zh_cn: 但如果你在建构 UI 想尽快给使用者更新，

124.en: or if you want to do some tool processing as soon as possible,

125.en: then this big pause might be a little irritating.
125.zh_tw: 這個大暫停可能有點煩。
125.zh_cn: 这个大暫停可能有点煩。

126.en: Now, if that's the case, I do have good news.

127.en: There is a feature in the API called fine-grained tool calling.
127.zh_tw: API 中有一個叫 fine-grained tool calling 的功能。
127.zh_cn: API 中有一个叫 fine-grained tool calling 的功能。

128.en: At its core, fine-grained tool calling does really just one thing.

129.en: It disables the JSON validation step.
129.zh_tw: 它停用 JSON 驗證步驟。
129.zh_cn: 它停用 JSON 验证步驟。

130.en: So if you enable fine-grained tool calling,
130.zh_tw: 啟用 fine-grained tool calling 後，
130.zh_cn: 啟用 fine-grained tool calling 后，

131.en: the API will wait for Claude to generate a couple of chunks.
131.zh_tw: API 會等 Claude 生成幾個 chunk。
131.zh_cn: API 会等 Claude 生成幾个 chunk。

132.en: It's going to join them together and then send that big chunk down to your server.
132.zh_tw: 把它們合在一起然後送到你的伺服器。
132.zh_cn: 把它们合在一起然后送到你的服务器。

133.en: So with this feature, you will see a more traditional streaming output when generating tool inputs.
133.zh_tw: 有了這個功能，生成工具輸入時會看到更傳統的串流輸出。
133.zh_cn: 有了这个功能，生成工具输入时会看到更传统的流式输出。

134.en: I do want to repeat, with fine-grained tool calling, JSON validation on the API is disabled.
134.zh_tw: 要再次強調，fine-grained tool calling 會停用 API 上的 JSON 驗證。
134.zh_cn: 要再次強调，fine-grained tool calling 会停用 API 上的 JSON 验证。

135.en: So your code running on your server now really should assume that you might be given invalid JSON,
135.zh_tw: 你伺服器上的程式碼應該假設可能收到無效的 JSON，
135.zh_cn: 你服务器上的代码应该假设可能收到无效的 JSON，

136.en: and you should implement some appropriate error handling.
136.zh_tw: 應該實作適當的錯誤處理。
136.zh_cn: 应该实作适当的错误处理。

137.en: The notebook that we were working on is set up for fine-grained tool calling.
137.zh_tw: 我們使用的筆記本已經設定好 fine-grained tool calling。
137.zh_cn: 我们使用的笔记本已经设定好 fine-grained tool calling。

138.en: So let's see what happens to our response when we turn it on.
138.zh_tw: 讓我們看看啟用後回應會怎樣。
138.zh_cn: 让我们看看啟用后回应会怎样。
